build.beforeBuildCommand: npm run build && npm --prefix ../sidecar run build

security.csp: default-src 'self'; img-src 'self' data: blob: http://asset.localhost http://pfpview.localhost; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; script-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost; font-src 'self'; media-src 'self' data: blob: http://asset.localhost; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'none'; frame-ancestors 'none'; form-action 'none'
security.devCsp: default-src 'self'; img-src 'self' data: blob: http://asset.localhost http://pfpview.localhost; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost ws://localhost:1420 http://localhost:1420; font-src 'self'; media-src 'self' data: blob: http://asset.localhost; object-src 'none'
